firmware.title: Tcard_CI7n-H332ABCD-T-GL-221205V1682
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: CI7n-H332ABCD-T-GL-221205V1682
Changed Functions:
This is a major upgrade to Android 13 and the brand new HiOS 12.6. Some of the new HiOS features are shown below:
1. Brand new desktop widgets bring you a new experience.
2. Swipe right on the lock screen to access quick tools. You can play music, record sound, take notes, calculate, and do more quickly without unlocking the phone.
3. Notification Center and Control Center: You can switch between the both by swiping left and right, without the necessity to swipe down from the top. Want to know the data usage? Swipe down to access Control Center and check it on the top. In Control Center, you can set Mute, Hotspot, Screenshot, and Flashlight directly by tapping the triangle at the bottom right of the corresponding icon. Moreover, your smart devices can be displayed on the lower section of Control Center.
4. Phone: You can group your contacts for better management.
5. The user experience of Calculator, Clock, File Manager, Notepad, Calendar, AI Gallery, and other system tools is improved. For example, you can tap a button in Calculator to turn it into a floating window, open Notepad to write and draw, and manage and view photos more smoothly.
6. Privacy security: In Settings, the brand-new Privacy Panel is provided, added with two features—Privacy Analyses and Privacy Protection to help you better identify app behaviors related to your privacy. There are 3 privacy protection policies for the daily use of your phone.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (TECNO SPOT) for more information.
